THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF DEFAULT OF 8-11-93 AS TO TONY GREEN HAVING BEEN ENTERED, LEAVING JAMES MOORE AS DEF. IN THIS ACTION. PL. EXH.#1, RENTAL/LEASE AGREEMENT, ID. PL. EXH.#2, 3DAY NOTICE, ID. PL. EXH.#3, PROOF OF SERVICE, ID. ALL EXH. INTO EVID. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY STREET, #615 SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,500.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,900.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
JUDGMENT WAS ALSO ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT TONY GREEN.
